notes: BERVO lacks a general "vegetation cover fraction" term. Closest concept: fractional canopy coverage, but no direct term exists. Candidate for BERVO extension.
CHESS measures field vegetation height; BERVO models canopy height per PFT. Same physical quantity, different context (observation vs. model parameter).
Replicate measurement 1 of vegetation height at plot.
CHESS records species identity (categorical); BERVO only has species count. Gap: BERVO needs a "plant species identity" term.
Individual stem height measurement. Maps to canopy height conceptually.
Diameter at breast height. BERVO has no stem diameter term. Critical gap for forest inventory data.
Canopy position classification (dominant/codominant/intermediate/suppressed). No BERVO equivalent.
Proportion of crown intact. No BERVO equivalent — relates to tree health/damage assessment.
Direct match. BERVO:0000685 is terrain aspect (azimuth of slope).
Percent cover of a cover type. Same gap as Vegetation_Cover — BERVO lacks cover fraction terms.
Categorical: bare soil, litter, rock, vegetation, etc. No BERVO equivalent.
Species or cover class name within a cover type. No BERVO equivalent.
Phenological observation (cone presence on conifers). No BERVO equivalent.
Tree health classification. No BERVO equivalent.
Type of damage (insect, fire, wind, etc.). No BERVO equivalent.
Wound presence on tree trunk. No BERVO equivalent.
Proportion of leaves remaining (deciduousness indicator). No BERVO equivalent.
Species binomial name. BERVO does not model taxonomy. Out of scope for a biogeochemical variable ontology.
Taxonomic family. Out of BERVO scope.
Common/working name for species. Out of BERVO scope.
Full taxonomic name with authority. Out of BERVO scope.
Species name. Out of BERVO scope.
Taxonomic family (duplicate column). Out of BERVO scope.
GBIF species identifier. Out of BERVO scope.
Herbarium voucher identifiers. Administrative metadata, not a variable.
Sampling date. Temporal metadata, not a biogeochemical variable.
Plot number or species code. Administrative.
Free text notes on cover. Administrative.
Free text notes on shrubs. Administrative.
Free text notes on trees. Administrative.
